programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: The Poseidon Crew finally start digging legendary ground in search of a multi-million-dollar nugget; Shane and Russell endure the snake-ridden wilderness in Pilbara.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: A robbery at the Gold Retrievers' camp puts more pressure on Chris and Brad's partnership; Marcus and Linden finally hit a rich patch of nuggets.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Cold Water Cowboys
programme.desc: The Coldwater Captains relive the most exciting moments of the past three seasons.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Cold Water Cowboys
programme.desc: Off the east coast of Newfoundland, the crew of the Atlantic Bandit heads into the world's deadliest ocean; in Cox's Cove, the Crane's Legacy is running two days behind the rest of the crab fishing fleet.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Cold Water Cowboys
programme.desc: Skipper Morris Anstey and the crew of the Sebastian Sails are in a sea of trouble; the Crane's Legacy is well into the most punishing halibut season the crew has ever encountered.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Littlest Hobo
programme.desc: Hobo gathers evidence against a hit-and-run driver and forces him to make a confession.

programme.title: The Littlest Hobo
programme.desc: Terrorists kidnap the son of a government official in hopes of having their demands met.

programme.title: Yellowstone Wardens
programme.desc: Shed antler hunting nearly turns lethal for one man; training for game wardens becomes eerily realistic; one camp of unruly hunters attracts the attention of wardens; when an endangered grizzly bear is shot, wardens come out in full force.

programme.title: Inside Taronga Zoo
programme.desc: A black rhino labor takes an alarming turn; a kangaroo needs surgery.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Offshore Outlaw takes risks in a short window to catch more bluefin as a huge storm approaches; Doghouse fights to maintain their hot streak and the lead.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: Hobo gathers evidence against a hit-and-run driver and forces him to make a confession.

programme.title: The Littlest Hobo
programme.desc: Terrorists kidnap the son of a government official in hopes of having their demands met.

programme.title: A Cut Above
programme.desc: The final Quick Carve weighs heavily on the contestants, who must create a wooden chain capable of lifting hundreds of pounds; the Master Carve has everyone feeling down as they create carvings that start under the sea.

programme.title: A Cut Above
programme.desc: A bowling challenge strikes up laughs while the Master Carve reveals the competitors' biggest hopes and fears; a shocking elimination stuns everyone.

programme.title: Wild Bear Rescue
programme.desc: A cub loses half its foot; a shy cub takes on a greedy cub; predators threaten the moose calves.

programme.title: Wild Bear Rescue
programme.desc: Angelika and Peter release two coastal bears; Kim attempts to rescue some black bear cubs.

programme.title: Inside Taronga Zoo
programme.desc: Maya the lioness complains about a broken tooth and needs to go to the dentist; newcomer Eve receives swimming lessons from her fellow seals.

programme.title: Timber Titans
programme.desc: Storms and mechanical breakdowns halt a team; In the Fraser Valley, floods trap the Peters' machine and block the construction site.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters
programme.desc: It's the end of the mining season and the last chance for all the opal hunting teams to make enough cash to survive; the Rookies gamble their hopes on one last haul of opal; the Opal Queen makes a final desperate dig.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters
programme.desc: New team the Bushmen clash with opal thieves raiding one of their mines; the Cookes hack an old digging machine; the Fire Crew hunt for a new deposit of rare black opal.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: Hog Wild has struggled to make its mark all season - halfway through the competition, it's now or never if the new boat wants to stay in the game.

programme.title: Dog Tales Rescue
programme.desc: Rob visits some rescued pitbulls as they go through K-9 police training; Danielle says goodbye to a long-term resident.

programme.title: Dog Tales Rescue
programme.desc: Danielle searches for the owners of a wandering horse; a family hopes to adopt two bonded dogs.

programme.title: Dog Tales Rescue
programme.desc: The team heads to North Carolina to help dogs impacted by a hurricane; three rescued sheep arrive at the farm.

programme.title: Dog Tales Rescue
programme.desc: Rob and Danielle head to Israel to rescue dogs from a shelter; a couple hoping to adopt needs theirs cat's approval; a visit with the farm chickens.

programme.title: Dog Tales Rescue
programme.desc: A dog with two broken legs needs surgery; a trainer works with Angel; a senior dog gets a new home.

programme.title: Dog Tales Rescue
programme.desc: The team helps with the canine over-population in Manitoba.

programme.title: Inside Taronga Zoo
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at what it takes to run the Taronga Zoo Sydney, Australia's largest zoo, located on the shores of Sydney Harbour.

programme.desc: Niall meets activists and scientists working together to place America's wild horses into safe havens.

programme.desc: Rookie team the Young Guns run into trouble as they look for pineapple opals; the Cooke Bros race against time hunting opals on another miner's claim; the Fire Crew run themselves broke.
